title: Our
subtitle: Tailored educational experiences for every age.

creche.name: La P'tite Crèche Ingeri
creche.intro: The first step in a unique journey of discovery. Personalised welcome, respect for each child's own rhythm.

pillars.title: Love and emotional security
pillars.desc: A stable, caring bond that continues the family cocoon.

pillars.title: Autonomy from an early age
pillars.desc: Drinking from a cup, exploring, choosing an activity, moving freely.

pillars.title: Gentle, progressive stimulation
pillars.desc: Sensory play, nursery rhymes, motor exploration, first interactions.

creche.calendar: Mon–Fri. Parent meetings & mini-workshops held regularly.

maternelle.name: Ingeri International School
maternelle.intro: French national curriculum + Montessori pedagogy + Biblical approach for harmonious, international development.

pillars.title: Language & Expression
pillars.desc: Stories, songs, prayers and guided exchanges.

pillars.title: Logic & First Numbers
pillars.desc: Objects, shapes and quantities to discover the order of the world.

pillars.title: Practical Life & Autonomy
pillars.desc: Getting dressed, tidying up, serving, taking care of oneself and others.
